flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Notre Dame rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.8k → $65.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Notre Dame rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.8k → $65.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Notre Dame fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Notre Dame are 89% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($100.0k vs $52.9k).
